metadata.title: Andrés Miranda | Portfolio
metadata.description: Personal portfolio of Andrés Miranda, Software Engineering student focused on full stack development and artificial intelligence.

about.title: I build clean, useful web experiences with intention.
about.description: A solid foundation in full stack development and constant curiosity about modern systems, automation and applied artificial intelligence.

content.p1: I am a Software Engineering student focused on full stack development and AI-based solutions. I am characterized by being self-taught, proactive and results-oriented.
content.p2: I have worked on various academic and personal projects that have allowed me to develop solid skills in programming, system design and problem solving.

experience.title: A career that mixes technical training, academia and real support.
experience.description: A journey focused on systems, technological support and continuous learning, with academic and work experience that lands in functional projects.

engineering.title: Software Engineering
engineering.company: Universidad Cooperativa de Colombia - Campus Pasto

technical.title: Labor Technician in Support, Systems and Computing

bullets.preventive: Preventive and corrective maintenance of computer equipment
bullets.networks: Installation/configuration of wired and wireless networks
bullets.security: Installation and configuration of security cameras

bullets.inventory: Monitoring and control of materials and products inventory
bullets.management: Organization and management of administrative resources

projects.title: Projects where I turn ideas into functional products.
projects.description: I work with clear interfaces, solid backend and a product layer designed for real problems.

moreProjects.heading: Other academic and personal projects
moreProjects.p1: Beyond the main projects, I have developed multiple applications and scripts ranging from complete CRUD systems to task automation.
moreProjects.p2: In the academic field I built systems like library managers and survey platforms, applying MVC architecture, user authentication, and relational databases.
moreProjects.p3: These works consolidate skills in full-stack development, database handling, validations, and efficiency for repetitive tasks.

legalconnect.title: LegalConnect
legalconnect.description: Technology platform oriented to support legal work. It allows analyzing contractual clauses, identifying possible risks and facilitating informed decision making through the use of artificial intelligence.

finassistant.title: FinAssistant
finassistant.description: AI-based application designed to solve financial mathematics problems. It allows performing complex calculations, explaining procedures step by step and supporting learning in financial topics interactively.

clinicalrecords.title: Clinical History System
clinicalrecords.description: Web system for the management of digital clinical histories, allowing to store patient information, medical records, informed consents and test results. Designed to improve organization, security and access to information in health environments.

contact.title: Let's talk about ideas, collaboration or the next project.

testimonials.description: I keep this section as a living space to record feedback from personal and academic projects.
